featured.headline: Indian billionaire targeted by Trump pours money into Donald Trump Jr.-backed startup
featured.dek: After being targeted by the Trump administration, an Indian billionaire secretly invested in a company backed by Donald Trump Jr., exposing pay-to-play politics.
